# Journify Docs

## Journify

- [Welcome to Journify](https://docs.journify.io/readme.md): Learn what Journify is and how you can use it to level up your data game.
- [Getting Started](https://docs.journify.io/getting-started.md): Get started with Journify by configuring your first sync.
- [Tracking API](https://docs.journify.io/tracking.md): Tracking enables you to collect all the valuable behavioral event data across your customer experiences.
- [Track Event](https://docs.journify.io/tracking/track-event.md): Track specific behaviors and activities your customers perform on your app or website to help build meaningful audiences.
- [Page Event](https://docs.journify.io/tracking/page-event.md): Track which pages your users have visited on your web app or website with the PageEvent call.
- [Identify Event](https://docs.journify.io/tracking/identify-event.md): Identify your users and keep an ongoing record of their behavior on your app or website.
- [Screen Event](https://docs.journify.io/tracking/screen-event.md): Track which screens your users have visited on your mobile app with the ScreenEvent call.
- [Common fields](https://docs.journify.io/tracking/common-fields.md): This are the list of fields that can be included with any call in the Journify spec (Identify, Track, Page and Screen Events).
- [First Party Tracking](https://docs.journify.io/tracking/first-party-tracking.md)
- [Conversion Attribution](https://docs.journify.io/tracking/conversion-attribution.md)
- [Consent Management](https://docs.journify.io/tracking/consent.md): How Journify enforces user consent preferences before forwarding events to destinations.
- [Sources](https://docs.journify.io/sources.md): Sources are websites, servers, mobile SDKs or cloud applications that can send customer data into Journify.
- [Android SDK](https://docs.journify.io/sources/android-sdk.md)
- [Bitrix24](https://docs.journify.io/sources/bitrix24.md)
- [BigQuery](https://docs.journify.io/sources/bigquery.md)
- [CleverTap](https://docs.journify.io/sources/clevertap.md): Enrich your customers data with CleverTap events
- [CSV](https://docs.journify.io/sources/csv.md): Import or enrich user profiles directly from a CSV file.
- [Google Sheets](https://docs.journify.io/sources/google-sheets.md)
- [Google Tag Manager Browser Template](https://docs.journify.io/sources/google-tag-manager-browser-template.md)
- [Google Tag Manager Server Template](https://docs.journify.io/sources/google-tag-manager-server-template.md)
- [Go](https://docs.journify.io/sources/go.md)
- [Hubspot](https://docs.journify.io/sources/hubspot.md): Build dynamic audiences using customer data sent from Hubspot
- [iOS SDK](https://docs.journify.io/sources/ios-sdk.md)
- [Java SDK](https://docs.journify.io/sources/java.md)
- [Javascript SDK](https://docs.journify.io/sources/javascript.md)
- [MySQL](https://docs.journify.io/sources/mysql.md)
- [Magento](https://docs.journify.io/sources/magento.md)
- [Node.js SDK](https://docs.journify.io/sources/node.js-sdk.md)
- [React Native SDK](https://docs.journify.io/sources/react-native-sdk.md)
- [Flutter SDK](https://docs.journify.io/sources/flutter-sdk.md)
- [Offline Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/sources/offline-conversions.md)
- [Offline Custom Audience](https://docs.journify.io/sources/offline-custom-audience.md)
- [PHP](https://docs.journify.io/sources/php.md)
- [Python](https://docs.journify.io/sources/python.md)
- [PostgreSQL](https://docs.journify.io/sources/postgres.md)
- [Salesforce](https://docs.journify.io/sources/salesforce.md): Build dynamic audiences using customer data sent from Salesforce
- [Salla](https://docs.journify.io/sources/salla.md)
- [Segment](https://docs.journify.io/sources/segment.md)
- [SendGrid](https://docs.journify.io/sources/sendgrid.md): Enrich your customers data with SendGrid email events
- [Shopify](https://docs.journify.io/sources/shopify.md)
- [Snowflake](https://docs.journify.io/sources/snowflake.md)
- [Sparkpost](https://docs.journify.io/sources/sparkpost.md): Enrich your customers data with Sparkpost events
- [HTTP API](https://docs.journify.io/sources/http-api.md)
- [Whatsapp Business](https://docs.journify.io/sources/whatsapp-business.md): Track your customers messages, orders and their transactions.
- [WooCommerce](https://docs.journify.io/sources/woocommerce.md)
- [Zid](https://docs.journify.io/sources/zid.md)
- [Zoho](https://docs.journify.io/sources/zoho.md): Enrich your customers data with Zoho webhook events
- [Destinations](https://docs.journify.io/destinations.md): Destinations are the business tools and apps that Journify sends your customer audiences to.
- [ActiveCampaign](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/activecampaign.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on ActiveCampaign
- [Amplitude](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/amplitude.md): Sync event data to Amplitude
- [Apollo.io](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/apollo.io.md): Sync your customers' data to contacts on Apollo.io
- [Adjust](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/adjust.md)
- [Adjust Server-to-Server](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/adjust-server-to-server.md)
- [Attio](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/attio.md): Push enriched data from your warehouse into Attio
- [Brevo](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/brevo.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Brevo
- [Bing Ads Offline Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/bing-ads-offline-conversions.md): Send offline conversion events to Bing Ads and optimize your return on ad spend
- [CleverTap](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/clevertap.md): Create personalized experiences to retain your most valuable customers, forever
- [Close](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/close.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Close
- [Courier](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/courier.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Courier
- [Customer.io](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/customer.io.md): Sync your data to customers on Customer.io
- [Facebook Ads Custom Audiences](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/facebook-ads-custom-audiences.md): Sync customers' data to Facebook Custom Audiences
- [Facebook Ads Pixel](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/facebook-ads-pixel.md): Track your website's customers events with Facebook Pixel
- [Facebook Conversions API](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/facebook-conversions-api.md): Enhance conversion insights by funnelling your customer's event data to Facebook Conversions API in realtime.
- [Facebook Offline Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/facebook-offline-conversions.md): Enhance conversion insights by uploading your offline conversion events to Facebook.
- [Freshsales](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/freshsales.md): Transform your selling experience with Freshsales
- [Google Ads Custom Audiences](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/google-ads-custom-audiences.md): Sync customer's first party data to Google Custom Audiences
- [Google Ads Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/google-ads-conversions.md): Enhance conversion insights by funnelling your customer's event data to Google Ads enhanced conversions in real time.
- [Google Analytics 4](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/google-analytics-4.md): Track your website's customers events with Google Analytics 4
- [Google Sheets](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/googlesheets.md): Sync your customer event data directly to Google Sheets for easy analysis and reporting
- [Google Measurement Protocol](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/ga4-measurement-protocol.md): Send server-side events to Google Analytics 4 using the Measurement Protocol
- [Google Measurement Protocol Mobile](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/ga4-measurement-protocol-mobile.md): Send server-side mobile app events to Google Analytics 4 using the Mobile Measurement Protocol
- [HubSpot](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/hubspot.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on HubSpot CRM
- [Criteo](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/criteo.md): Sync customers' data to audiences on Criteo
- [Intercom](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/intercom.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Intercom
- [Klaviyo](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/klaviyo.md): Power e-commerce focused email marketing with your warehouse data in Klaviyo
- [LaunchDarkly](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/launchdarkly.md): Keep your team's feature flags up-to-date with fresh list of contexts
- [LinkedIn Insight Tag](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/linkedin-ads-insight-tag.md): Track your website's conversions with LinkedIn Insight Tag
- [LinkedIn Ads Web Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/linkedin-ads-web-conversions.md): Enhance conversion insights by funneling your customer's event data to Linkedin Conversions API in realtime.
- [Mailchimp](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/mailchimp.md): Sync customers' data to subscribers on Mailchimp
- [MoEngage](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/moengage.md): Sync customers' data to users on MoEngage
- [MoEngage Server-to-Server](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/moengage-server-to-server.md)
- [OneSignal](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/onesignal.md): Sync customers' data to devices on OneSignal
- [Pinterest Custom audiences](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/pinterest-custom-audiences.md): Sync customers' data to customer lists on Pinterest Ads
- [Pinterest Tag](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/pinterest-tag.md): Track conversions using Pinterest client-side tag
- [Pinterest web conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/pinterest-web-conversions.md): Send web conversions to Pinterest via server to server integration
- [Reply.io](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/reply.io.md): Supercharge your sales team by syncing your most up-to-date customer and lead data from your warehouse
- [Salesforce](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/salesforce.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Salesforce
- [Sendgrid](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/sendgrid.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Sendgrid
- [Slack](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/slack.md): Get customers' actions via Slack messages
- [Snapchat Custom Audiences](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/snapchat-custom-audiences.md): Sync customer's first party data to Customer Lists on Snapchat Ads
- [Snapchat Ads Pixel](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/snapchat-ads-pixel.md): Track your website's customers events with Snapchat Pixel
- [Snapchat Ads Web Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/snapchat-ads-web-conversions.md): Enhance conversion insights by funneling your customer's event data to Snapchat Conversions API in realtime.
- [Snapchat Ads Mobile Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/snapchat-ads-mobile-conversions.md): Enhance conversion insights by funnelling your customer's app event sdata to Snapchat Conversions API in realtime.
- [Snapchat Offline Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/snapchat-offline-conversions.md): Enhance conversion insights by uploading your offline conversion events to Snapchat.
- [Stripe](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/stripe.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Stripe
- [TikTok Custom Audiences](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/tiktok-custom-audiences.md): Sync customers' first party data to TikTok custom audiences
- [TikTok Pixel](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/tiktok-pixel.md): Track your website's customers events with TikTok Pixel
- [TikTok Events API](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/tiktok-events-api.md): Enhance conversion insights by funnelling your customer's event data to TikTok Events API in realtime.
- [TikTok Offline Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/tiktok-offline-conversions.md): Enhance conversion insights by uploading your offline conversion events to TikTok.
- [X Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/x-conversions.md): Send conversion web events to X and optimize your return on ad spend
- [X Mobile Conversions](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/x-mobile-conversions.md): Send mobile conversion events to X and optimize your return on ad spend
- [X Pixel](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/x-pixel.md): Track your website's customers events with X Pixel
- [Zendesk Support](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/zendesk-support.md): Deliver better support by making user events and attributes available inside Zendesk Support
- [Zendesk Sell](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/zendesk-sell.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Zendesk Sell
- [Zoho](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/zoho.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Zoho CRM
- [Pipedrive](https://docs.journify.io/destinations/pipedrive.md): Sync customers' data to contacts on Pipedrive
- [Syncs](https://docs.journify.io/syncs.md): Syncs are the connections that send your customer data from Journify to your destinations.
- [Event Mapping](https://docs.journify.io/syncs/event_mapping.md)
- [Field Mapping](https://docs.journify.io/syncs/field_mapping.md)
- [Signals](https://docs.journify.io/signals.md): Signals pulls data from ad platforms, analytics, and stores to give you one place to understand your real performance.
- [Facebook Ads](https://docs.journify.io/signals/facebook-ads.md)
- [Google Ads](https://docs.journify.io/signals/google-ads.md)
- [Google Analytics 4](https://docs.journify.io/signals/google-analytics4.md)
- [Snapchat Ads](https://docs.journify.io/signals/snapchat-ads.md)
- [TikTok Ads](https://docs.journify.io/signals/tiktok-ads.md)
- [X Ads](https://docs.journify.io/signals/x-ads.md)
- [Salla](https://docs.journify.io/signals/salla.md)
- [Zid](https://docs.journify.io/signals/zid.md)
- [Shopify](https://docs.journify.io/signals/shopify.md)
- [Looker Studio](https://docs.journify.io/signals/looker-studio.md)
- [Power BI](https://docs.journify.io/signals/powerbi.md)
- [Tableau](https://docs.journify.io/signals/tableau.md)
- [BI Integration - Schema Reference](https://docs.journify.io/signals/schema-ref.md)
- [Data Terminology](https://docs.journify.io/data-terminology.md): Learn more about important data concepts and terminology used throughout Journify's documentation.
- [Data Ingestion](https://docs.journify.io/data-terminology/data-ingestion.md): Learn the basics of what data ingestion is and how Journify can perform this important data function for your business.
- [Data Warehouse](https://docs.journify.io/data-terminology/data-warehouse.md): Learn what a data warehouse is and why it has become an important part of the modern data stack.
- [Data Activation](https://docs.journify.io/data-terminology/data-activation.md): Learn the basics of what data activation is, what it can do for your business, and how you can get started.
- [Reverse ETL](https://docs.journify.io/data-terminology/reverse-etl.md): Learn all about Reverse ETL and why it is becoming the new standard in data activation.
- [Data health alerts](https://docs.journify.io/data-health-alerts.md): Guides to investigate any data issues that were detected in your Journify account
- [Drop in the number of events received by a source](https://docs.journify.io/data-health-alerts/drop-in-the-number-of-events-received-by-a-source.md)
- [Drop in the number of events delivered by a sync](https://docs.journify.io/data-health-alerts/drop-in-the-number-of-events-delivered-by-a-sync.md)
- [Increase in the number of invalid events skipped by a sync](https://docs.journify.io/data-health-alerts/increase-in-the-number-of-invalid-events-skipped-by-a-sync.md)
- [Drop in the number of monitored fields delivered by a sync](https://docs.journify.io/data-health-alerts/drop-in-the-number-of-monitored-fields-delivered-by-a-sync.md)
- [Increase in the number of failed events on a sync](https://docs.journify.io/data-health-alerts/increase-in-the-number-of-failed-events-on-a-sync.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.journify.io/readme.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
